fundamentals.name: Bloom Energy Corporation
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Bloom Energy Corporation designs, manufactures, sells, and installs solid oxide fuel cell systems for on-site power generation in the United States and internationally. It offers Bloom Energy Server, an energy server platform to convert fuel, such as natural gas, biogas, hydrogen, or a blend of these fuels, into electricity through a non-combustion electrochemical process. The company also provides Bloom Electrolyzer for producing hydrogen. It sells its products through direct and indirect sales channels to utilities, data centers, retail, healthcare, education, telecom, manufacturing, and other industries. The company was formerly known as Ion America Corp. and changed its name to Bloom Energy Corporation in 2006. Bloom Energy Corporation was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in San Jose, California.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with exceptional revenue expansion and strong analyst conviction, but trades at a premium valuation with thin current profit margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates significantly; next earnings date is 2026-04-28.
positives: Revenue growth 130.4% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Analyst growth est, current Q 286.1% and current FY 179.8% — strong future growth expected.
Last quarter EPS surprise 242.4% (0.44 vs 0.13) — significant earnings beat.
Consensus buy rating from 24 analysts — strong institutional support.
negatives: Forward P/E 69.96x — valuation is very high.
Price/Sales (TTM) 35.12x — also reflects a premium valuation.
Profit margin 0.2% — current net profitability is extremely thin.
Return on equity 1.3% — low return on shareholder capital.
Debt/Equity 311.48 — high leverage on the balance sheet.
Mean target $260.18 is below current spot price — analysts see limited upside from current levels.

news.paragraph: Bloom Energy (BE) received an upgrade to Outperform from Daiwa, following a strong Q1 earnings surprise where EPS beat estimates by over 240%. The company's revenue growth has been exceptional, and analyst estimates for the current quarter and fiscal year remain robust. Despite a high forward P/E, the stock has outperformed its industry peers over the last six months, indicating positive momentum.
